The '''Gruvians''' were the native [[Sentience/Legends|sentients]] of the planet [[Gruvia]] in the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]].

==Biology and appearance==
Gruvians were tall, green, mound-shaped beings who shuffled along without visible legs or feet. They had two mouths, eight eye stalks, and four thin arms with three-fingered hands.<ref name="PSG">''[[Platt's Starport Guide]]''</ref>

Two well-known Gruvians were [[Benja Da'aapp|Benja]] and [[Olall Da'aapp]], two tourists who were often seen at the [[Kuat Passenger Port]] during the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] era.<ref name="PSG" /> Gruvians were known for their alcoholic beverage, [[Gruvian Tovash]].<ref name="PSmG">''[[Platt's Smugglers Guide]]''</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Gruvian_T11.jpg|thumb|left|100px|A Gruvian (possibly) pictured in "[[In the Beginning]]."]]
A Gruvian-like alien appears in "[[In the Beginning]]." This character has ten eyes, and only one visible mouth and pair of arms. This may either represent a variation in Gruvian appearance, or a different species.
